headline: Brian Niccol Earned the ‘Retail Messi’ Nickname: Starbucks Same-Store Sales Jump 6.2% After 7 Quarters of Decline
summary: The Morning Brew Daily hosts handed Brian Niccol a nickname this week: “the retail Messi.” The label arrived after Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX) reported a 6.2% increase in same-store sales. This ended a streak of 7 quarters of flat or declining sales and sending the shares up nearly 6% after hours. This was on top of a ... Brian Niccol Earned the ‘Retail Messi’ Nickname: Starbucks Same-Store Sales Jump 6.2% After 7 Quarters of Decline

headline: Investors Heavily Search Starbucks Corporation (SBUX): Here is What You Need to Know
summary: Starbucks (SBUX) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.

headline: AB InBev CEO Michel Doukeris on Q1 results, state of alcohol demand and growth outlook
summary: Michel Doukeris, Anheuser-Busch InBev CEO, joins 'Squawk Box 'to discuss the company's quarterly earnings results, what's behind the rise in beer sales, growth in the non-alcohol sector, impact of GLP-1s on alcohol demand,  and more.

headline: 3 Large-Cap Stocks We Find Risky
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

raw.headline: 3 Large-Cap Stocks We Find Risky
